title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NoBroker

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NoBroker
jsonLd.description:
NoBroker has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
